creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Are you willing to be listed as the new maintainer?
I'm not very comfortable resurrecting an unmaintained port.

Also, this would have been easier for me to get an attachment with all the files.  Right now I will have to pull each file from SVN individually which is kind of a pain and a bigger barrier to jump.

You wouldn't happen to have the port as it as before it was cut that you could put in a tarball and attach to this bug report would you?

John
